programme.desc: Scrappy threatens to abdicate the throne on the eve of Momma Dee's wedding. Kalenna and Tony meet with a therapist. Stevie takes the guys on a farewell fishing trip and discovers a secret about Joseline. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Momma Dee's wedding day arrives, but her children may not show. Margeaux reveals a secret to Nikko that turns his world upside down. Stevie makes a huge decision, while Joseline gives her big performance without her husband by her side. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Mimi's new relationship has everyone in Atlanta buzzing. Momma Dee snuffs out treason after Rasheeda and Kirk leave Scrappy high and dry. New on the scene, the King family has everyone on edge, as Tiara and Tommie compete to be Scrapp DeLeon's queen.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Chaos ensues between Tommie and Tiarra at Mimi's party. Tiarra confronts Scrapp with an ultimatum. Tammy discovers some surprising news about a new model that she wants to hire. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Tammy's luncheon with D.Smith and Betty turns left. Stevie J is back from his Hollywood adventures in LA. Waka Flocka returns to the ATL for an event. Scrapp sets up a meeting with Tiarra and Tommie.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Joseline returns to Atlanta with a vengeance. Scrappy and Rasheeda hash out their issues. Karlie lets it all hang out with Lyfe Jennings. K.Michelle pops up, and Scrapp DeLeon pops off at KK over her relationship with Tiarra. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Joseline dishes on Karlie Redd, Stevie J and KK. Kirk's daughter asks for help with her music career. Tommie's suspicions about Scrapp come to a fever pitch, and Mimi agonizes over Stevie J and Chris meeting for the first time. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: A surprise guest at Joseline's party leaves everyone at odds. Scrappy discovers Bambi's extracurricular activities. The King Family is divided over loss. Deb Antney makes Momma Dee and Shirleen squash their beef once and for all. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Nature's Networks
programme.desc: Explore the complex web of relationships that Earth's biodiversity relies on.

programme.title: Nature's Nurseries
programme.desc: In the ever-lasting circle of life it's all animals' most important task to create new life to ensure the survival of the species.

programme.title: New Kids in the Wild
programme.desc: Visiting the last stronghold of the giant river otter in Brazil's beautiful Pantanal wetland and track pup Rio and his siblings as they test the waters, team up to evade a jaguar ambush, and become a cohesive family unit.

programme.title: Shetland's Otters
programme.desc: Discover the secrets of the shy, sweet otters that live in these remote islands.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: Volcanologist Tom Pfeiffer explores some of Indonesia's most remote volcanoes.

programme.title: Secrets of Wild Australia
programme.desc: Small, rare marsupials possess unique qualities.

programme.title: Primeval New Zealand
programme.desc: Travel back through time in Primeval New Zealand; science reveals the true story about where New Zealand's wildlife icons came from, and the reasons for their unique evolution.

programme.title: Hotspots
programme.desc: Borneo, the third-largest island in the world, houses hundreds of species of mammals, amphibians, and fish.

programme.title: Alien Abyss
programme.desc: Getting acquainted with an array of ocean oddballs and learning how billions of years' worth of changes have shaped their looks and skills; meeting blind worms who fish, walking sharks, tree-climbing crabs and much more.

programme.title: Dawn to Dusk
programme.desc: The summer solstice drives macaques into cool water and makes cranes dance on the chilly plateau.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: Japan is home to two of the top five most dangerous volcanoes on the planet.

programme.title: Wild Korea
programme.desc: Korea is known as a modern, high-tech nation, but beyond the bustle of the cities exists a land of stunning natural beauty and remarkable wildlife including the beautiful goshawk, the bottleneck dolphin and the curious raccoon dog.

programme.title: Wild Austria: Created by Water
programme.desc: Winter is a tough time for creatures in the Austrian Alps; as spring comes, millions of migratory birds flock to the lowlands around Lake Neusiedl.

programme.title: Secret Life of the Wombat
programme.desc: Near the Snowy Mountains of southeast Australia is Wombat Wood, a wooded area dotted with the burrows of wombats.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #7 The Pursuit of Harimao's Treasure
programme.desc: To retrieve the Harimao's Treasure, Lupin and the gang must gather three lost statues. Lupin reluctantly partners with the aging "double-O" MI-6 agent Sir Archer and his granddaughter Diana to gather the statues.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #8 The Secret of Twilight Gemini
programme.desc: As Lupin's mentor Don Dolune lies on his deathbed, he hands the master thief a gift: the diamond named Twilight. But it's only half of the treasure-the other half of the Twilight can be found in Morocco…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Notorious gangster, Al Capone left behind five tiles that reveal the location of his massive gold hoard when put together. Out of the five tiles, Lupin and Fujiko have three in their possession.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Inspector Zenigata concocts an extravagant plan to finally capture Lupin by luring him in with a fake meteor made from 6 tons of pure gold. Low and behold, his plan backfires and Lupin and his gang make off with the meteor.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin sneaks into an old castle to steal a collection of priceless angel paintings, owned by the late Malcolm Hurst. Inside the castle, Lupin meets a mysterious girl named Flora, who knows the whereabouts of the angel paintings.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen are out at sea attempting to retrieve the gold inside a sunken pirate ship. However, a female pirate gang interrupts their retrieval mission and both parties leave empty-handed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are in South Africa to receive a nautical chart from a retired Nazi that shows the location of a sunken Nazi treasure. However, two young German soldiers interrupt the exchange and a skirmish ensues.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are in the small city of San Pico in Central America. However, the city was in the midst of a war between the Government Forces and the Guerilla Army. Leading the Guerilla Army is Jigen's old army pal, Giranco.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Unsurprisingly, Fujiko had once betrayed her heist partner Garb, known as the Grim Reaper, and left him for dead. Garb, who has seemingly returned from the dead, is determined to kill Fujiko and has an uncanny ability to dodge bullets with ease.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A mysterious cult that idolizes a solid gold Virgin Mary statue abducts Fujiko and they're planning to burn her at the stake as a witch. However, her kidnapper and the cult leader look vaguely familiar to Lupin. Have they crossed paths before?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin has a horrible case of athlete's foot and visits Dr. Budweiser, who is also a cloning expert, for treatment. The doctor takes a sample of Lupin's skin under the guise of treating his Athlete's foot, but the doctor has another plan up his sleeve.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A mysterious message appears in the newspaper and Lupin takes it as a sign from this late grandfather, Lupin I, to reclaim his diamond keepsake.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin manages to steal the Dracula Heart Ruby from a mysterious woman known as Mother. The Dracula Heart Ruby is known to bleed once every century and whoever drinks its blood maintains their youth for another 100 years.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin steals a painting of Lupin I's beloved from Baltan Gallery in Paris. However, the painting turns out to be a forgery and Lupin has a clue as to who is painting the forgeries. With his daughter Sophie held hostage.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko attend a lavish party full of wealthy women in order to steal their jewelry. However, the castle tower where the party was being held turns out to be a rocket ship. The hijacked rocket transports the party and guests to a small island.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Mrs. Alda, a wealthy heiress is kidnapped and Lupin shows up to claim the ransom money. However, the real mastermind behind the kidnapping is Mrs. Alda herself. After she gets the ransom money, she erases Lupin's memory and frames him for the crime.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin learns he needs a pure-hearted girl to find an ancient Persian treasure and his computer chooses a girl named Lori. After getting some hands-on training from Jigen and Goemon, the two are headed to Jordan to find the treasure.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The Golden Apple, known as "Eve's Apple" is being transported to New York City on board a luxury cruise ship and Inspector Zenigata has a gut feeling Lupin is after it. Inspector Zenigata's hunch is on the mark as Lupin and Jigen are onboard the ship.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin is over the moon when Fujiko promises to marry him if he steals the ICPO's gold for her. Lupin pulls off the heist right under Inspector Zenigata's nose, but the two soon find themselves locked up in jail.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: It's the Mafia Boss' birthday party and everyone is gambling away. Lupin's next target is the casino's safe. While attending the party, Lupin meets a girl named Jenny, who is willing to help him pull off the heist to sell her name.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin breaks out a man named Parker from a Mexican prison in order to steal the treasure Parker had hidden away somewhere.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin, who was once duped by Mamushidayu into stealing diamonds, decides its payback time. Will Lupin get his revenge and finally get his share of diamonds after all?

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/11/2003 - Tempers were rising between the Red Sox and Yankees in the 2003 ALCS. After plenty of jawing from both teams, the benches eventually cleared which led to Pedro Martinez tossing 72-year-old Don Zimmer to the ground during the scuffle.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/14/03: With the Cubs one win away from their first World Series since 1945, the Marlins would stun Chicago in Game 6 of the NLCS following The Steve Bartman Incident.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/25/2003: Josh Beckett tags Jorge Posada for the final out in his nine-strikeout, complete game shutout vs. the Yankees in Game 6 of the 2003 World Series, giving the Marlins their second championship.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 7/20/04: On July 20, 2004 Albert Pujols goes 5-for-5 at the plate against Cubs pitchers and smashes three home runs in the Cardinals' incredible 11-8 comeback win.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: Randy Johnson was one of baseball's most accomplished pitchers, but the perfect game was one feat that had eluded him throughout his career. That changed on May 18, 2004 vs. the Braves when the 40-year old became the oldest pitcher to toss a perfect game.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: Ken Griffey Jr. gifted his father Ken Griffey Sr. with an incredible moment on Father's Day 2004. Junior came to the plate in the 6th inning and crushed the 500th home run of his career. After rounding the bases, father and son shared a hug to celebrate.

programme.title: MST3K: The Amazing Transparent Man
programme.desc: During the feature film The Amazing Transparent Man (1960), a mad scientist makes an escaped criminal invisible so he can steal radioactive supplies.

programme.title: MST3K: The Atomic Brain
programme.desc: A rich, elderly woman wants her doctor to transplant her brain into the body of one of her young captives.

programme.title: MST3K: The Beast Of Yucca Flats
programme.desc: After a devastating atomic test, Joseph Javorsky, a defecting Russian scientist, is transformed into a murderous radioactive beast. Can desert patrolmen Jim Archer and Joe Dobson stop the creature before it kills again?

programme.title: MST3K: The Beatniks
programme.desc: When a hold-up carried out by his two-bit hoodlum friends goes tragically awry, Eddie Craneâ€™s bright future as a recording artist from the mean streets could be in jeopardy.

programme.title: MST3K: The Brain That Wouldn't Die
programme.desc: New guy Mike Nelson finishes his training and makes his way into the theater. His first outing is the movie The Brain That Wouldn't Die

programme.title: MST3K: The Crawling Hand
programme.desc: Joel and the Bots have a tough time agreeing on how to spend their free time between segments of the teen sci-fi thriller "The Crawling Hand".

programme.title: MST3K: The Creeping Terror
programme.desc: Mike and the 'bots watch The Creeping Terror (1964), with its infamous walking-carpet monster, and parody Love, American Style (1969).

programme.title: MST3K: The Dead Talk Back
programme.desc: Metaphysics helps to solve a murder case while Mike and the Bots impersonate the Grateful Dead.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: La tensión parece calmarse tras la reconciliación entre Diana y Brandon. Camilo y David tienen una plática sincera y Kelly aclara sus intenciones con Karen. Daphne saca su furia y arremte contra Aylin.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Dos nuevos EX llegan a la Villa y se desatan los celos. Diana deja las cosas claras con Brandon en la Love Suite. Todos disfrutan de un día fuera de la Villa y el alcohol les ayuda a encararse.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Esteban busca hacer un trío y Aylin busca exclusividad. Llega un nuevo EX y hace que Frida respire de nuevo. Diana esta insegura de Brandon. Kelly es mas territorial con Robbie por culpa de Michelle.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: En medio de una fiesta, Camilo se casa con David en el peor momento y se abre la Sala Tornado desatando nuevos conflictos. Kim va por Ian, mientras que Suavecito llama a no engancharse con sus parejas.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Karen y Suavecito se van a una cita y se desatan los celos incontrolables de Kim y se despide de Ian. La peluca María José trae revelaciones importantes y llega un nuevo EX a saldar cuentas.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Frida y Brandon se reencuentran y Diana toma cartas en el asunto. Kim y Suavecito se besan apasionadamente pero Ian tiene un As bajo la manga. La llegada de un nuevo Ex y alguien es expulsado.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: La Sala Tornado llama a votaciones. Algunos se van de fiesta a una casa flotante. La salida de Daphne se convierte en el pretexto para hacer explotar una bomba de tiempo que provoca una gran pelea.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Una dinámica los obliga a decirse las cosas de frente. Michelle y Kelly arreglan sus diferencias en la Sala Tornado. Salen por grupos a disfrutar de Colombia. Festejan el cumpleaños de Diana.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Las vacaciones llegaron a su fin y las relaciones comienzan un nuevo ciclo en un barco a Cartagena. David y Camilo aclaran los malentendidos. Hacen un último brindis todos juntos.

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: Hace tres años que Henry mantiene una relación en línea con Alejandra. A lo largo de los años ambos han estado hablando en línea y Henry cree que ella es la mujer de sus sueños.

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: Jade conoció a William a través de las redes sociales y descubrió que él en verdad era una popular estrella de las redes sociales. Pero ella teme que detrás de las conversaciones no esté William, porque él se niega a verse con Jade.

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: En la era digital, los jóvenes encuentran el amor online, conectándose con personas que jamás han conocido cara a cara.

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: Luis vive en México y tiene una relación con un chico de Colombia llamado Jonathan. En un comienzo ambos sentían simplemente atracción, luego la relación llegó a otro nivel y decidieron que ya era hora de conocerse.

programme.title: Are you the one? el match perfecto
programme.desc: Mientras los ganadores de la competencia salen para conocer la Playa del Espejo y disfrutan de su premio en plan de romance, los demás eligen una de esas parejas para la Cabina de la Verdad. Vadhir Derbez visita la casa de los solteros.

programme.title: Matlock

programme.desc: When Stephanie and Maribel's daughters were first on the show, they showed no respect. After failing to break through to them on stage, Steve resorted to sending them to jail. Steve gives an update on whether jail was a wake-up call!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Michael and Flora are no longer dating, but they have a 3-year-old daughter together. Michael thinks that Flora's boyfriend Dwayne is hurting his daughter. Is he telling the truth?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Robert believes his wife may have faked her pregnancy and the miscarriage just to keep him around! Demetrius thinks Nikki is lying to him and seeing other men on the side. Nikki wants to put these accusations to rest.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Josh confesses to cheating and fathering a child, while Robert hides an affair with two women.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Jamie le ha sido infiel a su novio con una mujer! Después, Steve cree que su esposa ha sido infiel con otro hombre. A continuación, LaToya viene a causar un conflicto familiar. ¡Ella ha estado siendo infiel con la hermana de su novia!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Carla ha estado siendo infiel a su novio con su mejor amigo y su hermana! Después, Yvonne le contará a su amiga Marie que ha tenido relaciones sexuales con su novio. Mary Sue y su amante secreto, Cory, han venido a confrontar al novio de Mary Sue, Scott.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: John pesa casi 700 libras y no podría ser más feliz. Su novia Kim le hace elegir entre ella y un sándwich de 3 metros de largo. Él elige el sándwich.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jen le contará a John que lo va a dejar por su amante secreto, Jerry, de 73 años. Después, Danika tiene una sorpresita para su prometido y se siente obligada a decirle que ella realmente es un hombre.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Josh y Amy descubrirán hoy que sus parejas han sido infieles. Después Madeline le contará a Andre que ha estado acostándose con Diante. Después, Quincy está comprometido con Callie pero ella no sabe que Quincy ha sido infiel con Amy.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Dave cuenta que los regaños constantes de su novia lo han arrojado a los brazos de una mujer de 72 años! A continuación, Joe está a punto de decirle a su hermosa novia que tuvo un rollo de una noche con alguien increíble.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Fred engañó a su amante Jay, ¡así que ahora Jay quiere su merecido! A continuación, la obsesión de Terry por su panda de peluche está a punto de hacer que su novia se vaya. Después, Benny le dirá a su amigo que usa ropa interior de mujer en secreto.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Kiki y Kat eran compañeras de trabajo que se enamoraron. ¡Pero ahora Kat dejará a Kiki por un hombre! Después, Cedric viene a decirle a su novia que quiere llevar su relación a otro nivel... y a otra persona.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Carl ha venido a decirle a su novia que se ha estado acostando con su peor enemiga, Keisha. A continuación, Donte le dirá a su mejor amigo, Quincy, que está acostándose con su prometida. Después, Janel y Nikkie están peleando por el mismo hombre.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Anita está dispuesta a dejar a su marido por su ex-amante. Luego Theresa está siendo infiel a su prometido con su hermano. Más tarde Kevin viene a decirle al ex de su novia, Jermaine, que se aleje.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Kenny vivía con dos hermanas, Lora y Misty, que también son sus amantes, pero las trata como sirvientas. Después, Jerry confronta a Kenny con los resultados de 9 pruebas de paternidad positivas, pero Kenny dice que solamente le importan 2 de sus 9 hijos.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Hope ha venido a enfrentarse a su mejor amiga, Laura, por robarle a su novio, Joey, y luego comprometerse con él. A continuación, John dirá que no tiene la culpa por acostarse con la mejor amiga de su novia.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Misty odia tanto al marido que se acaba de casar con su mejor amiga que está dispuesta a pagar el divorcio. ¡Lucus está dispuesto a divorciarse de su esposa de 6 semanas si su familia no deja de entrometerse!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: James está comprometido con Amanda, pero ahora confiesa lo de Melanie. Después, Jewel compite por el amor de su amante cuando Christa anuncia que lo quiere para ella.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Margot y Willy tienen otra de su discusiones, pues ella insiste en que cobre su herencia. Panchita y Santiago oyen la discusión con preocupación.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Silvano se queda sin palabras, esperando que el detective le diga quién es la madre que busca desde hace tanto tiempo. Jimena termina por convencer a Iván que debe casarse con Adriana.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Caridad descubre que Maribella si puede ver y la conmina a que le diga la verdad a Luis Mario. Caridad le da una semana de plazo a Maribella para hablar. Guillermo trata de convencer a Minerva.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eduarda se lleva a Caridad a la cocina y pretende asustarla para que guarde silencio sobre lo que descubrió de Maribella, pero se le enfrenta y termina amenazándola.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura se siente más tranquila cuando está listo el retrato hablado de su partera. El comisario está seguro que esto es un gran paso en la investigación que adelantan.

programme.title: Acorralada

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Diana y Maximiano se besan, pero luego ella le afirma que ella es una persona responsable, y que entró a la mansión solo a trabajar.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Maximiliano le dice a Larry que se imagina que él está enamorado de Diana. Larry le dice a Gaby que le recuerde mandar a hacer sus tarjetas de invitación para su boda con Pilar.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Ignacio le comenta a Andrés que por haberlo rechazado, va a mandar a Diana a la cárcel.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Hilario y Mariana intentan que Ricky no se dé cuenta de que su mamá y su abuela están borrachas, pero no lo logran. Mariana libera a Hilario y Ricky de toda culpa.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Whitebeard struggles to withstand the full force of the Marine onslaught. With the executioner's swords hovering above Ace's head, Straw Hat Luffy discovers a new ability!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Whitebeard orders his men to help Luffy clear a path to the execution scaffold, but someone close to the Rubber-man rises to derail the rescue mission at the last second!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy must defeat the man who taught him how to fight – his own grandfather – in order to save Ace. Battling his own flesh and blood won't be easy, but a waxy ally is there to provide backup!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Ace is finally free from the execution scaffold! Luffy and his brother make a fearsome team as they blaze a path toward salvation. Ravaged by the war, Whitebeard wistfully commands his men to make the journey to the New World without him!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Despite Whitebeard's order to retreat, Ace is drawn back to the battlefield by the cruel taunts of a Marine adversary. Luffy watches in horror as his brother makes what could be his last stand!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: An eerie silence falls over the battlefield as Luffy and Ace share a heartbreaking final moment together. With his dying breath, Ace begs his brother to convey a message to his fellow pirates.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Anguished cries echo across the battlefield in the wake of Ace's tragic death. Luffy – paralyzed by grief – must be carried to safety, but Whitebeard summons the strength for one last ferocious attack!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Whitebeard's children watch in horror as the old man faces off against the villainous Blackbeard pirates. Though his injuries are mounting and the odds are stacked against him, Whitebeard never runs away from a fight!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The world reacts to Whitebeard's death with shock and awe. Meanwhile, Jimbei risks his life to save Luffy. Blackbeard reveals the depraved depths of his nefarious nature!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Blackbeard and his men seek to sink Marineford, Jimbei and Luffy's desperate attempt to flee is thwarted by Akainu's fiery fists. The situation appears dire until a former enemy lends a sandy hand!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Trafalgar Law and the Heart Pirates offer Luffy a submarine escape route. Blackbeard continues his reckless rampage, and a puny pink-haired marine changes the world with a scream!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Heart Pirates head for the bottom of the ocean as Trafalgar Law prepares to operate on Luffy and Jimbei. Meanwhile, the arrival of Shanks brings the bloodshed to a sudden halt!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The world rejoices in the wake of Whitebeard's death, and a host of powerful pirates vie for his position. Meanwhile, Luffy's friends fear that Ace's death may be more than the rubber-man can handle – if he ever wakes up!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Power-hungry pirates terrorize innocent citizens once protected by Whitebeard. Luffy's nightmarish awakening sends him on a reckless rampage that could land him in an early grave!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: One Piece X Toriko Crossover

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A flashback to the younger days of Luffy and Ace reveals their unusual upbringing under the not-so-watchful eye of villainous mountain bandits!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The flashback continues as Ace robs a ruthless gang of pirates, and Luffy is left to take the fall! Will Ace and his friend Sabo let Luffy be tortured to death - or will they risk their high seas dreams to save him?!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Ace and Sabo race to rescue Luffy from the clutches of a murderous gang of pirates! Sabo wants to grab Luffy and make a break for it, but Ace refuses to back down from a fight – even when he's outnumbered!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When a nobleman recognizes Sabo in the streets, Luffy and Ace learn the painful secret of their friend's past. As a sign of solidarity, the three boys pledge to become pirates and hoist a toast to brotherhood!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After another beating from Garp, Luffy and his friends take to the jungle and build a pirate hideout at the top of an enormous tree. First order of business: booby trap the new place!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his friends vow to defeat the giant tiger that's been stealing their food. Ace gets angry when his father's identity is revealed. Sabo's parents hire pirates to track down their son!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Ace, and Sabo take pirate lessons from a mysterious old scallywag who just might know the secret to defeat the big tiger – and becoming a good captain!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The brothers are captured by a gang of pirates, and Sabo is handed over to his noble father, where the boy quickly discovers a sinister plot to destroy Gray Terminal forever!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While flames spread across Gray Terminal, Sabo makes a desperate attempt to escape the trappings of his noble birth and save his brothers. Meanwhile, Luffy and Ace must fight to avoid an untimely end!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy is spared from a fiery death by an unlikely rescuer, but Ace refuses to leave Gray Terminal until he settles the score with Bluejam. Meanwhile, Sabo makes waves with a last-ditch escape attempt!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Ace receive troubling reports of a Celestial attack on Sabo's ship. Ace is eager to seek out the responsible parties and exact revenge, but a letter from his absent brother tempers his eagerness to fight!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: In the wake of Sabo's death, Luffy and Ace grow stronger than ever by continuing their daily routine of nonstop fighting. As the years pass, each brother prepares to set sail in search of future adventures!

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A "more powerful" Andromeda ship explodes due to likely sabotage, forcing Dylan's crew to save them.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka endangers both her crew and an entire planet when a former love shows up.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The Andromeda receives a cry for help from Rev Bam.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda

programme.desc: While caught in a battle between two Nietzschean prides, the crew captures a hostile who claims that his pride possesses a map of the slipstream.

programme.desc: A lighthearted Fourth of July road trip turns into a nightmare after Johnny is hit with a vision of Bruce dying in a car crash.

programme.desc: When Johnny foresees the theft of a prized religious artifact on display at Faith Heritage, he infiltrates the band of masked robbers in order to save innocent lives.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Lotto Fever
programme.desc: Johnny is kidnapped by a “loser” convinced that the psychic ruined his life by helping him win the Lotto.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ash is baaack! 30 years after his last Deadite fight, badass blowhard Ash Williams unleashes the Evil in an act of stoned stupidity, bringing Deadite mayhem into his life again.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mom does all she can to provide for her kids, including taking up with five sugar daddies to make ends meet, but when jealousy rears its ugly head, this mom winds up dead and her killer is not who you would expect.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: To keep their marriage fresh, a young couple turns to a life of sex games and sharing spouses, but when threesomes and foursomes lead to murder, investigators struggle to prove who killed this swinger.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A lover's quarrel and a quick cash scheme lead to the murder of a happy retiree; the Hollywood community is stunned when a body is found under its most famous landmark.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mother becomes a murder victim while living a double life; a web of deception, sex and murder sends detectives on a multi-year hunt to figure out who could have murdered her.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A high-speed car chase ends with a 40-year-old newlywed shot dead in front of her husband and stepdaughter; is this a robbery gone wrong, a gang ordered hit, or something more sinister.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: The quintessential girl next door is discovered brutally killed on Thanksgiving weekend; it would take investigators over a year to uncover the dark obsession that led to her murder.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A foursome, a stripper, and a biker, is just the beginning for investigators of this massage table homicide; everyone is shocked as a secret fetish for murder is revealed.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mother is found shot and stabbed in her kitchen; multiple suspects emerge, but the true mastermind of this murder hits closer to home than anyone expected.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: What started as a perfect marriage evolves into a threesome; after one of the participants winds up dead, the killer turns out to be someone the investigators never suspected.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: When a psychic and her adult daughter are found killed under bizarre circumstances, the list of suspects grows long as investigators discover that male escorts, blackmail, fraud and love spells all played a part in this chilling double murder.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A serial sniper terrorizes the entire D.C. metro area by discreetly targeting random victims out in public and in plain sight.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In 1990, a serial killer terrorizes the University of Florida's campus, killing five students in under four days; the Gainesville Ripper leaves behind a crime scene where all the victims have been stabbed but the females have been posed like dolls.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In New Jersey four bodies are found dismembered, bagged, and thrown in roadside garbage cans; the "Last Call Killer" hunted his victims openly in piano bars but no one suspected he could be hiding in plain sight, working as a local nurse.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Dallas police discover three women murdered with their eyes surgically removed; police believe they have a deranged doctor on the loose until two rookie cops find themselves on the trail of a man with a talent for taxidermy and a hatred for women.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A killer hijacks the highways of Sacramento as several women are found strangled with their clothing cut into precise but odd patterns; a survivor leads police to a sports car driving deviant posing as a good samaritan to poach potential victims.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: When the Hillside Stranglers are caught police realize they still have another serial killer running rampant in Los Angeles; he tortures and toys with his model victims while keeping pieces of their jewelry as he snaps their last photo ever.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Texas authorities have a killer riding the rails and leaving a literal trail of bread crumbs after eating at victims' tables; when more murders are linked, the FBI names a Most Wanted suspect and a national manhunt for The Railroad Killer ensues.

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank comb through a master collector's untouched outbuildings in North Carolina. After getting past a few petrified hams they find a true gem, a 1950 Studebaker that Mike falls in love with.

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: FBI

programme.title: FBI

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: As the team investigates a deadly robbery that garnered a cache of automatic weapons for the killers, they discover one of the perps is a classmate of Jubal's son, who is reluctant to cooperate with the case.

programme.title: FBI

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a wealthy accountant is gunned down for secretly testifying against a notorious drug lord, the team's investigation leads Tiffany to ask for help from a friend who was formerly with the NYPD and is related to the dangerous crime boss.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: A series of secrets and blackmail involving a young, up and coming actor are exposed when Don and his team investigate the murder of a young woman in his Hollywood Hills mansion.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: After recognizing numerological patterns in the Bible verses that the killer leaves behind, Don and his team are able to track the killer's movements but are one step behind when a gripping twist brings the chase to an end.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the team investigate the secret world of alternate reality games after a man plunges to his death while participating in one such game. Amita's life is in danger when her hidden gaming ability becomes the key to tracking down the killer.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and his team work to track down a serial rapist who is using his position as a police officer to lure his victims.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don's old flame Robin Brooks returns to California to prosecute an incarcerated criminal, but when three witnesses involved in the case are murdered, Don and his team realize that the next victim may be Robin and must work to keep her safe.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: A mass poisoning at a cult compound leads the FBI team into a maze of old grudges and a complex murder plot.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The team investigates a pattern of increased ATM kidnappings when a woman who was abducted and forced to withdraw random amounts of money from her ATM is murdered. Also, Charlie meets the man who will decide the fate of his FBI security clearance.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and his team investigate the case of a 28-year-old marketing executive, Maggie Cartwright, who seems to have simply walked away from her life, leaving everything behind.

programme.title: The Godfather Part II
programme.desc: The continuing saga of a young Vito Corleone growing up in Sicily and in New York during the 1910s and then following Michael Corleone in the 1950s as he tries to expand the family business.

programme.desc: Director/screenwriter Francis Ford Coppola's definitive new edit and restoration of THE GODFATHER: PART III, with remastered picture and sound. Michael Corleone (Pacino) seeks to free his family from crime and find a suitable successor to his empire.

programme.title: The Godfather

programme.title: The Godfather Part II

programme.title: Evil Dead II
programme.desc: Ash, the sole survivor of THE EVIL DEAD, returns to the same cabin in the woods and again unleashes the dead. With his girlfriend possessed and his body parts running amok, Ash must again single-handedly battle the damned in this unhinged horror classic!

programme.title: My Bloody Valentine (1981)
programme.desc: 20 years ago, a tragic accident on Valentine's Day took the lives of 5 miners when supervisors left their posts to attend a Valentine's Day dance. On the disaster's first anniversary, the only survivor returns to the town for bloody revenge

programme.title: Maximum Overdrive
programme.desc: After a mysterious comet turns every machine on Earth into a homicidal rampage device, the survivors at the Dixie Boy Truck Stop are making a stand, and human vengeance goes into overdrive.

programme.title: C.H.U.D. (1984)

programme.title: Children of the Corn

programme.title: Day of the Dead

programme.title: The Souvenir: Part II

programme.title: Zodiac

programme.title: C'mon C'mon

programme.title: First Reformed

programme.title: Addams Family Values
programme.desc: The family’s future grows bleak when the no-good nanny marries Fester and has the kids shipped off to summer camp. But Wednesday still has a Thing or two up her sleeve.

programme.title: Coneheads
programme.desc: One look and you know they're from a very strange place. They're from New Jersey, by way of “France,” by way of far- off, far -out Remulak. They're Coneheads.

programme.title: Super 8

programme.desc: Eat your veggies is a line that children from Mexico to Morocco hear from their parents. Meet a pair of chefs, Israel Montero and Alfredo Chaves of Kaah Siis Restaurant, who grow, cook, and consume their own garden-fresh vegetables.

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: Jorge Vallejo is among Mexico City's rare chefs. His food has inspired Rick and Deanne for many years, but what inspires Jorge? One word: Tacos. Rick follows Jorge on a taco tour, from Tacos Gus to Taqueria Los Cocuyos, it is taco time.

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: Ricks got nothing against cerveza and margaritas, but Rick wants to explore another side of Mexican drinking: wine. Mexican wine. And no, that is not a misnomer. In fact, the burgeoning craft of Mexican wine is growing in unusual places.

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: In the land of the tortilla, bread is often overlooked. If Chef Elena Reygadas has anything to say about it, however, bread will soon rise as an important player in Mexican cuisine, and she certainly has the right tools to effect change.

programme.desc: In this episode, Pati celebrates everyone’s favorite Mexican creation, the taco. She tries two of Jalisco’s best tacos — marlin tacos in Puerto Vallarta and barbacoa tacos in Guadalajara.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati spends a day in Sonora’s capital, Hermosillo, visiting some of the city’s best culinary destinations. From gigantic burritos at Doña Guille, to a meat lover’s feast with the owner of the popular restaurant Mochomos.

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine

programme.desc: We're looking hard, but the numbers aren't stacking up. Is life on other planets really that hard to find? Does it even exist? We have not discovered so much as a signal, so maybe we really are alone in our neck of the galaxy!

programme.title: Pale Red Dot
programme.desc: On the hunt for other solar systems, scientists have discovered an Earth-sized planet orbiting the star nearest to our Sun, Proxima Centauri. It's an important test of whether we are alone in the universe.

programme.title: The Space Shuttle's Last Flight
programme.desc: As Atlantis completes its 135th and final mission, this definitive documentary charts the rise and fall of the most ambitious space programme ever undertaken, the space shuttle. For the past three decades since its first launch in 1981.

programme.title: Return To The Moon
programme.desc: Examining how renewed excitement about returning to the moon could lead to a colony.

programme.title: Space Junk
programme.desc: After 50 years of launching our dreams into space, we're left with a troubling legacy: a growing ring of orbiting debris that casts a shadow over the future of space exploration.

programme.title: Birth of a Black Hole
programme.desc: It was one of the greatest mysteries in modern science: a series of brief but extremely bright flashes of ultra-high energy light coming from somewhere out in space. What can we learn from the violent birth of a black hole?

programme.title: Einstein's Universe
programme.desc: A fascinating exploration of Einstein's theory of relativity told by narrator actor Peter Ustinov, and a cadre of preeminent scientists. Produced on the centennial of Einstein’s birth in 1979 by WGBH and BBC, based on Nigel Calder’s titular book.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: Eddie's back! So are the laughs. Eddie Murphy returns as Detroit cop Axel Foley, getting down with the fun-and-sun set as never before in this revved up thrill-ride of a movie.

programme.title: The Golden Child
programme.desc: As ‘The Chosen One’, Murphy’s on a madcap mission to save The Golden Child, a youth with mystical powers who’s been abducted by an evil cult.

programme.title: Trading Places
programme.desc: The story of a down-and-out con artist who trades lifestyles with a well-to-do investor.

programme.title: Harlem Nights
programme.desc: In the waning days of Prohibition, Sugar Ray and his adopted son, Quick, run a speakeasy called Club Sugar Ray. Gangster Bugsy Calhoune pays corrupt cop Phil Cantone to close Club Sugar Ray down.

programme.title: Boomerang
programme.desc: Advertising executive Marcus Graham is a quintessential bachelor, Graham is never without a new lady on his arm. Enter Jacqueline, his new boss, and Marcus is on the receiving end of his own patented behavior for the first time!

programme.title: Norbit
programme.desc: Murphy stars as mild-mannered Norbit, who gets a second chance at love with his childhood sweetheart, Kate. However, obstacles may make this romance slightly more difficult than expected.

programme.title: My Blind Brother
programme.desc: A slacker (Nick Kroll) and his blind athlete brother (Adam Scott) compete for the love of the same woman (Jenny Slate) in this hilarious comedy.

programme.title: Our Idiot Brother
programme.desc: Ned (Paul Rudd) means well but has no common sense. When he barges into the lives of his three sisters (Emily Mortimer, Elizabeth Banks, and Zooey Deschanel), hilarity ensues.

programme.title: Art School Confidential
programme.desc: A satirical look at the cult of celebrity in the story of a cop who goes undercover as an art student and gains critical acclaim for his work.

programme.title: Eye of the Beholder
programme.desc: A private eye shadows a female serial killer of men all over the U.S. without her knowing as he, strangely enough, occasionally acts as her guardian angel.

programme.title: Lady Vengeance
programme.desc: A man is wrongfully convicted for kidnapping and murdering a young child.

programme.title: I Saw the Devil
programme.desc: A dangerous psychopath's latest victim is the pregnant fiancée of elite special agent Soo-hyun. Obsessed with revenge, Soo-hyun is determined to track down the murderer, even if doing so means becoming a monster himself.

programme.title: The Invitation
programme.desc: In this taut psychological thriller by Karyn Kusama (Girlfight, Jennifer's Body), the tension is palpable when Will shows up to his ex-wife Eden and new husband David's dinner party.

programme.title: Vacancy
programme.desc: A suspenseful, classic thriller, in the tradition of Alfred Hitchcock, starring Luke Wilson and Kate Beckinsale, that will keep you on the edge of your seat and your heart pounding! Rated: R

programme.title: Quarantine
programme.desc: When a news crew decides to trail a brave fire-fighting team, they never suspect that the first call for help they respond to that night may be their last. Now they're trapped in an apartment complex sealed off by the government. Rating: R

programme.title: Deliver Us from Evil (2014)
programme.desc: A NYPD officer (Eric Bana) and unconventional priest Mendoza (Edgar Ramírez) who join forces to investigate a series of disturbing & inexplicable crimes. Together, they must combat the possessions that are terrorizing their city before it's too late.

programme.title: Oculus
programme.desc: A woman tries to exonerate her brother, who was convicted of murder, by proving that the crime was committed by a supernatural phenomenon.

programme.title: 30 Days of Night
programme.desc: Josh Hartnett (The Black Dahlia, Pearl Harbor) crosses over to the dark side in this bone-chilling adaptation of the cult-hit graphic novel, brought to the screen in all its demonic glory.

programme.title: 30 Days of Night: Dark Days
programme.desc: Almost a year has passed since Barrow, Alaska’s population was decimated by vampires. Stella, mourning her husband’s murder, has been travelling the world trying to convince others that vampires exist.

programme.title: Silent Hill
programme.desc: Based on the best-selling horror action game, Silent Hill stars Radha Mitchell (Man on Fire) as Rose, a desperate mother who takes her adopted daughter, Sharon, to the town of Silent Hill in an attempt to cure her of her ailment. Rating: R

programme.title: The Hunt For Red October
programme.desc: A new technologically-superior Soviet nuclear sub is heading for the U.S. coast; however, one CIA analyst thinks the captain will defect the submarine and he only has hours to prove it.

programme.title: Miami Blues
programme.desc: An ex-con (Alec Baldwin) tiptoes on the borderline of psychotic behavior, playing cops and robbers on both sides of the law. He robs and kills one minute and poses as a cop the next in this thriller with a comic edge.

programme.title: The Getaway
programme.desc: An ex-con and his devoted wife must flee from danger when a heist doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: The Last Letter
programme.desc: Catherine Wright struggles with a debilitating sleep disorder. Her husband Michael struggles to cope when their newborn son lay in the wake.
A naïve young man assumes a dead man’s identity in order to join an underworld game of Russian roulette. Costarring Mickey Rourke, Jason Statham, and Michael Shannon.

programme.title: Honest Thief
programme.desc: Wanting to lead an honest life, a notorious bank robber (Liam Neeson) turns himself in, only to be double-crossed by two ruthless FBI agents.

programme.title: Backstabbing for Beginners
programme.desc: Based on a true story, an idealistic young employee working at the UN investigates the grisly murder of his predecessor and uncovers a vast global conspiracy, that may even involve his boss, in this gripping and timely thriller.

programme.title: World's Greatest
programme.desc: Clinging to the world’s highest mountains and forming ice caps on both poles, glaciers leave an impression on the landscape and on all who bear witness to their splendor.

programme.title: World's Greatest
programme.desc: Along coasts, one element ends and another begins. No two days are ever the same on a coastline: the only thing that remains a constant is the timeless power of the sea.

programme.title: World's Greatest
programme.desc: We are captivated by oceans, rivers, and lakes - the power, the flow, the reflective stillness. And as we seek to get closer, we immerse ourselves in an expanding range of aquatic experiences.

programme.title: World's Greatest
programme.desc: Celebrate the world's greatest icons of life, including Galapagos, Palau, Serengeti, Indonesia, and the Great Barrier Reef. See how earth, fire, ice, water, and wind created these wonders and marvel at a planet bursting with life.

programme.title: World's Greatest
programme.desc: Brave the frontiers of the world’s most remote cities. More than distant trading posts and isolated regional hubs, cities like Alice Springs, Jaipur and even Las Vegas serve as gateways to the wild places of the Earth.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Archeological Museum of Athens
programme.desc: From a dodgy archeologist who discovers a golden mask to an ancient gadget that reveals the future, discover the secrets inside the National Archaeological Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the State Historical Museum, Moscow

programme.title: The Travel Bug
programme.desc: Join Morgan as he visits one of Japan’s biggest festivals in the beautiful city of Takayama. Here, he gets a taste for the old world before exploring the wilderness of the country’s interior and visits places few westerners ever explore.

programme.title: The Travel Bug
programme.desc: Morgan is heading to where he first got his taste for travel: Thailand. Here, he explores the chaos of Bangkok and Phuket, while also checking out their surroundings. Check out some of the well-known sites, but also visit a few of the area's secrets.

programme.title: The Travel Bug

programme.desc: We visit the medieval walled city of Carcassonne and check in to the only five star hotel within its walls, Hotel de la Cite. Part two finds us in another city steeped in history chasing gastronomic delights in Prague.

programme.title: Travel In Style

programme.title: Travel In Style

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Ash is sleeping peacefully until he is awoken by Brock and Misty with alarming news: there’s something wrong with Pikachu’s voice! When Ash becomes concerned, he runs to the nearest Pokémon Center with Pikachu.

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: As our heroes are walking in the countryside, they notice a 'Missing Persons' poster of an undeniably familiar face: it looks exactly like James from Team Rocket! Is it really him in the poster?

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Our heroes discuss the rumor that a rare wild Farfetch has been seen in the area. Ash and Misty both vow to catch it, and soon they get their chance when the Pokémon appears!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: On leaving the Pokémon Center, our heroes discuss what they think will hatch from the Pokémon Egg Ash discovered. Nearby, Team Rocket begins hatching another daring plan to make it theirs!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: During a battle with another Trainer’s Rhyhorn, the bulb on Bulbasaur’s back begins to glow, prompting Ash to take it to the local Pokémon Center. They soon discover that Bulbasaur isn’t sick—it’s getting ready to evolve!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: On their way to Cinnabar Island, our heroes join Officer Jenny and the police force’s Growlithe in some special training, hoping to improve Pikachu’s battling skills.

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: On a brief stop for lunch, Ash, and his friends meet Todd Snap, a Pokémon photographer who has been trying to get a perfect shot of Pikachu.

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Realizing that he hasn’t won any Gym badges for a while, Ash signs up for the Pokémon League Admissions Exam, a great chance to prove he’s got what it takes to become a Pokémon Master!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Ash and the gang decide to check out a breeding center that they saw on a commercial. However, the center is a cover for a diabolical scheme from Team Rocket members Butch and Cassidy—old rivals of Jessie and James!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Misty and Jessie compete to be Queen of the Princess Festival! Ash and Brock lend Misty their Pokémon for the battle, and Jessie takes a licking despite a surprise Pokémon of her own.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Our heroes travel to Cinnabar Island, where Ash hopes to win the Volcano Badge. A strange character offers riddles about how to find the Gym, where Ash and Pikachu have a fiery battle with a Pokémon they’ve never seen before!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Ash has finally located the Gym, suspended above a pool of molten lava! This battle for the Volcano Badge can only be won by a strong Fire-type Pokémon, so Ash must rely on his misbehaving Charizard.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: On a visit to Professor Oak’s house, Ash runs into Gary, and they talk about the upcoming Pokémon League. Professor Oak says they should learn from each other rather than competing, and that teamwork pays off when Team Rocket attacks!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Ash and his mother take a vacation to Seafoam Island. While he's there, he's looking for the programmer of the Pokédex to learn about the peculiar evolution of SlowPoké. Team Rocket's bumbling brings to light this surprising mystery!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: When Ash wipes out during a surfing attempt, Victor rescues him and tells him about Humungadunga, a giant wave that sweeps through every 20 years. Can Ash and Pikachu give Victor the confidence he needs to catch the giant wave?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Armed with Armor
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he counts down wild creatures that come equipped with their very own body armor!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack travels to Rwanda where he meets up with some old friends and makes some new ones. Join Jack and his family as they encounter extremely rare golden monkeys while trekking through the jungle in search of endangered mountain gorillas.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Today, Jungle Jack is in Zambia getting an up-close look at some of the toughest reptiles on the planet – fierce and dangerous Nile Crocodiles! Then he takes a walk on the wild side with white rhino, giraffe, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Suzi head deep into Rwanda's Virunga Mountains on a trek to find endangered Mountain Gorillas.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In Sao Paulo, Jack visits the famed Institute BuTanTan, which has been producing anti-snake bite serum since 1900. In research labs, Jack encounters Brazilian Rattlesnakes, Jararacas and 50,000 poisonous spiders.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Walking on the Wild Side
programme.desc: Today, Jungle Jack is leaving the safari truck behind and lacing up his walking shoes for a walk on the wild side, as he counts down seven unforgettable adventures he took on foot!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Jungle Jack meets up with amazing animal moms and the little ones they care for. A jaguar looking after her cub, a baby bear sleeping alongside its mom, a white rhino protecting her calf, a cheetah mom in South Africa and whole herd of elephant mammas!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Check out this adventure to the Atacama Desert in Chile, where Jack searches for wildlife in the most unlikely of places, and gets a first-hand look at what it's like to live in this harsh yet beautiful environment.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is heading to the Wild West to meet up with some of America's most iconic species! Bears, Wolves, Bison, Big Horn Sheep and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack visits a breeding project focused on saving the endangered condor, the largest flying bird in the world. With its unique location in the middle of prime condor habitat, “condor Hausi” hopes to reproduce the massive bird in captivity.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Creatures of the Night
programme.desc: Prepare for a fright as Wild Countdown is venturing into the night! Stealthy hunters equipped with night vision, giants so powerful they could crush you with a single step, plus bats, rats and deadly vipers!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Misunderstood Animals
programme.desc: Today, Jungle Jack is going to reveal the truth about some of the animal kingdom’s most misunderstood creatures, like sharks, stingrays, wolves, gators and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Baby, You're the Greatest
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is going more than a little baby crazy! Today, cute and cuddly creatures guaranteed to make you smile. A darling orangutan, wee little warthogs, a sleeping baby bear and more cuteness than you can count!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jack as he counts down six species that makes their homes at the top of the world: chimpanzees in mountains of Africa, guanacos in the Andes of Patagonia, Alaska’s enormous brown bears and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: The lush lands of Lope are home to rare and unique creatures like Forest Elephants, Forest Buffalo, and Red River Hogs. Plus loads of primates, and Jack has a close encounter with a gorilla!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he meets up with researchers on the front-lines of animal conservation as they work to protect Elephants, Lions, Rattlesnakes, Bats and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack for an adventure with rare and unique animals that all wear white. Arctic wolves, beluga whales, polar bears, white zebras and even an albino alligator!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack explores tributaries off the Panama Canal in search of wildlife like Capuchin Monkeys, Geoffroy's Tamarins, Spectacled Caimans, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: At a training center of Canine Companions for Independence, Jack learns how dogs are trained to assist the disabled. From volunteer-raised puppies to graduates of the advanced training program, CCI dogs are something special.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Panama's Bocas del Toro archipelago is home to beautiful beaches and pristine waters, and it's also home to a high concentration of Bats! Jack hikes into a remote cave for an up-close look at the beneficial species.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is heading to the island-nation of Curacao for some quality time with its winged residents. From fearless flying Bats, and powerful Ostrich to pretty-in-pink Flamingos.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as meets the thick-skinned members of the pachyderm family. Rhinos, Elephants, Hippos, Tapirs, and Warthogs.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: River Adventures
programme.desc: Get ready to set sail with Jungle Jack for rolling river adventures from Africa to the Amazon! Rivers provide more than drinking water for wildlife- a river can also be a habitat, a hiding place, and even a runway.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with the ultimate Jack-of-all-trades as he immerses himself in exciting and sometimes dirty jobs caring for animals. A vet's assistant caring for Rhinos, a Bat researcher in South America, working with a King Cobra in Malaysia, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack takes his grandson on an epic Serengeti safari. They witness Cheetahs and Lions on the savannah, Wildebeest, and Zebra starting their annual migration, and visit a local Maasai school.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: What could be better than getting up-close animal encounters with wildlife from Africa, Asia, and North America? Doing it all in one place, right here in the ole' US of A!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Top of the Pach-yderm
programme.desc: Join Jack for a colossal countdown with the mighty pachyderms! From the biggest land mammal in the world, the African elephant, to Borneo’s pygmy elephant, Jungle Jack is counting down his favorite elephant encounters all the way to number one!
